ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the album */,
  "media_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media type of the album */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the album */,
  "track_count" INTEGER /* Number of tracks on the album */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover image */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_media_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_type_id") REFERENCES media_types ("media_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography or description of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "formed_date" TEXT /* Date the artist or band was formed */,
  "disbanded_date" TEXT /* Date the artist or band disbanded (if applicable) */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the music publisher */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's official website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the publisher was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the album was sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_types" (
  "media_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media type */,
  "media_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the media type (e.g., CD, Vinyl, Digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the media type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing content */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, purchase) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the store's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)
